why: CHART: downtrend off 7427 exhausted at 7359 base; higher low 7359->7362; first green candle (10:20 close 7367.3) with 5-min momentum flipping +0.07%. Reversion thesis toward VWAP 7395. GEX CONFIRM: growing pika floor 7340 (+7.1M, 1mDelta+0.5) just 20pts below = defended support/defined risk; strong positive-gamma +26M dampens downside and favors mean reversion; clear air overhead to 7425 pika king, no wall blocking move to VWAP.

CHART: reversion target VWAP 7393.76 reached (spot 7389, +22pts from entry); bounce approaching exhaustion into overhead. GEX: barney wall 7400 (-11M) just 11pts up in positive-gamma regime where levels hold = reversion caps here. Banking +0.29% underlying before the wall round-trips. Thesis complete.

CHART: persistent higher-highs grind off 7395 base, price 7416 above VWAP 7400, broke the 7409 midday ceiling, now pressing the 7427 day high. GEX CONFIRM (escalator): pika FLOOR building right under price at 7410 (+6.0M, 1mDelta+0.7) = defined ~6pt risk defended by extreme positive gamma +76M; escalating pika KING magnet at 7440 (+26M) now ABOVE the day high = breakout-favored target with NO barney wall between spot and 7440. Regime supports the drift up. Target 7427 then 7440; cut on 7410 floor break.

CHART: escalator-continuation thesis failed to confirm — price stalled at entry (7416) into a pin, no push toward 7427, 5-min momentum rolled negative -0.02%. GEX: +70M positive gamma re-pinning at 7416, not advancing to the 7440 magnet. Cutting flat to avoid 0DTE theta bleed and rollback risk; thesis did not trigger. Disciplined scratch.

CHART: confirmed DAY-HIGH BREAKOUT — 13:10 impulse candle +7pts broke 7427, new HOD 7429.5, holding above (7429.4), 5/15-min momentum turning up. GEX CONFIRM: strong pika FLOOR jumped up to 7425 (+15.7M, growing) right under the breakout = tight ~4pt defined risk defended by +83M positive gamma; strong pika KING magnet 7440 (+42M) 11pts above with NO barney wall between = clear pull target. Escalated floor confirms breakout defense. Target 7440 magnet; cut on break back below 7425.

CHART: breakout run stalled — price rejected 7435 twice (upper wick, closed 7429.9), failed to reach the 7440 target, 5/15-min momentum dead (0.00%/-0.01%). GEX: extreme +114M positive gamma is CAPPING price below the 7440 magnet, turning the run into a pin. Floor 7425 held (structure ok) but the move to target isnt delivering; banking near-flat to avoid 0DTE theta bleed in the pin rather than round-trip. Thesis pinned short of target.
